A calm family home concept built around warm textures, concealed storage and natural light.
The family wanted a refined home that felt warm, uncluttered and easy to maintain. The layout needed better storage, improved circulation and a consistent material language.
The challenge was to create a premium mood without making the apartment feel heavy or over-designed. Every element had to support daily family use.
A restrained palette, layered textures, concealed storage and simple furniture lines create a calm home with enough flexibility for everyday life.
A focused workplace balancing collaborative energy with quiet, concentrated work.

The team needed a flexible office that could support focused work, informal reviews and client meetings without losing a clear visual identity.
Acoustic privacy and generous circulation had to coexist within an efficient commercial floor plate.
Layered lighting, warm timber notes and carefully zoned shared spaces give the office clarity without making it feel rigid.
A familiar family home renewed with lighter finishes, smarter storage and easier movement.
Living room, bedrooms, storage and finish upgrades
The owners wanted to retain the warmth of their long-lived home while updating its storage, lighting and everyday usability.
The renovation needed to respect existing elements and limit disruption while giving the rooms a coherent new character.
A lighter palette, integrated joinery and selective surface upgrades make the home feel calm, open and distinctly personal.
A relaxed neighbourhood cafe shaped by tactile finishes and an easy indoor-outdoor mood.

A modular display rhythm, concealed storage and precise accent lighting create an elegant, adaptable showroom.
A compact apartment made more generous through soft tones, built-in storage and clean sightlines.

The family asked for a bright, low-maintenance home with enough storage for daily life and a comfortable setting for guests.
Every room needed to work harder without feeling filled with furniture or heavy joinery.
Full-height storage, pale finishes and visually light furniture preserve openness while meeting practical needs.
A reassuring healthcare arrival space with intuitive movement, privacy and a calm material palette.

The clinic needed a professional first impression that reduced visual stress and made patient movement easy to understand.
Privacy, accessibility and operational visibility required careful coordination in a limited front-of-house area.
Clear zoning, soft indirect light and durable finishes create an orderly environment that still feels warm and human.
A villa renovation that pairs generous proportions with restrained detail and natural warmth.
Living areas, bedrooms, lighting and material renewal
The owners wanted to simplify an ornate interior and create a quieter backdrop for family life and collected objects.

About Design Essentials, a Delhi NCR interior design and execution studio.
A design and execution studio for spaces that need to feel considered, not crowded.
Based in Pitampura, Delhi, Design Essentials works across Delhi NCR to create residential and commercial interiors with a balance of aesthetics, usability and site-level practicality.
Design is only successful when the finished space works in real life.

Our role is to connect ideas with execution. That means understanding how the space will be used, planning the technical details early, selecting materials carefully and coordinating the site so the final result remains faithful to the approved concept.

Design, sourcing, site coordination and handover remain connected through one organised process.
A space should look considered, but feel completely natural to use.
